name: Overgrown
desc: Thick grass, vines, or other growths cover this arena, making movement far more difficult.
effect: This _Arena_ is _Rough_. All Size 1 or less creatures have _Soft Cover_. A creature may Attack the Arena; if they deal at least 3 _Slash_ Damage they may create a piece of _Terrain_ that does not have Overgrown. Any effects that Targets the whole Arena and does at least 8 _Slash_ Damage removes Overgrown.

name: Cliff
desc: This arena is a sheer cliff, difficult to climb with few handholds.
effect: While in this _Arena_ creatures are always _Climbing_.

name: Gusting
desc: A powerful gust that lasts only a short while.
effect: When this Terrain is applied, remove any [_Cloud_] _Terrain_. Non-Melee Attacks against a creature in this _Arena_ or that pass through or originate from this _Arena_ automatically decrease their Rank by 1 unless they are [_Wind_] or [_Lightning_].

name: Veiled
desc: Terrain filled with dust, smoke, mist, or some other obscuring agent.
effect: All creatures in this _Arena_ benefit from _Soft Cover_.

name: Stalagmite
desc: A large rock, log, or some other.

name: Stalactite
desc: A large rock, log, or some other.
effect: Only [_Flying_] creatures may _Occupy_ this; if they do, they do not lose _Flying_.
destroy: When destroyed, this falls to the ground. Creatures in the _Arena_ must _Negate_ [_Reflex_ 8]; on a failure they are _Hit_, on a success they are instead _Grazed_. This is a [_Stab_, _Earth_] effect. Create four _Moderate Sources_ [_Earth_].

name: Oil
desc: A slick coat of oil covers this area, making passage difficult.
effect: This _Terrain_ is _Rough_. If this _Terrain_ is _Ignited_, it automatically becomes _Roaring_ and rolls all end of round effects twice and takes the higher.

name: Tripping Hazard
desc: A low protrusion that, most of the time, is easily avoided, but could trip one forced into it.
effect: If a creature is made to _Occupy_ this _Terrain_ with _Forced Movement_ they fall _Prone_.

name: Blazing
desc: A burning piece of terrain that has been ignited.
effect:
Blazing is always applied to a piece of _Terrain_ or an _Arena_. When creatures start their _Turn_ in this _Terrain_ or first enter it on their _Turn_ they take 4 _Fire_ Damage and gain _Alight_ 1. All other effects of the Terrain continue to persist, but its _Threshold_ is halved. At the end of each _Round_ roll a d6 for each piece of _Blazing_ _Terrain_, at _Disadvantage_ if not on _Flammable_ _Terrain_:
* **1-2:** The flames sputter and die; replace _Blazing_ with _Smoldering_ and, if on _Flammable_ _Terrain_, reduce its _Hardness_ by 1.
* **3-4:** The flames continue and nothing changes with this Terrain.
* **5-6:** Flames spread. What happens depends on whether an entire _Arena_ or a piece of _Terrain_ is _Blazing_:
	* **Terrain:** _Ignite_ a random piece of _Flammable_ _Terrain_ in this _Arena_. If the _Arena_ is _Flammable_ instead _Ignite_ it.
	* **Arena:** _Ignite_ a piece of _Flammable_ _Terrain_ in all adjacent _Arenas_.
interactions: If this would become _Wet_, it becomes _Smoldering_ and _Wet_ is not applied.
special: Blazing is instead a _Major Source_ if applied to an entire _Arena_. If a _Flammable_ piece of a _Terrain_ is _Destroyed_ any _Terrain_ created as a part of that is also _Blazing_.

name: Roaring
desc: A piece of terrain covered in intense, roiling flames.
effect:
Roaring is always applied to a piece of _Terrain_ or an _Arena_. When creatures start their _Turn_ in this _Terrain_ or first enter it on their _Turn_ they take 6 _Fire_ Damage and gain _Alight_ 2. All other effects of the Terrain continue to persist, but its _Threshold_ is halved. At the end of each _Round_, roll a d6 for each piece of Roaring _Terrain_, at _Disadvantage_ if not on _Flammable_ _Terrain_:
* **1-2:** The flames die down; replace _Roaring_ with _Blazing_ and, if on _Flammable_ _Terrain_, reduce its _Hardness_ by 1.
* **3-4:** The flames continue and nothing changes with this Terrain.
* **5-6:** Flames spread. What happens depends on whether an entire _Arena_ or a piece of _Terrain_ is _Blazing_:
	* **Terrain:** _Ignite_ a random piece of _Flammable_ _Terrain_ in this _Arena_. If the _Arena_ is _Flammable_ instead _Ignite_ it.
	* **Arena:** _Ignite_ a piece of _Flammable_ _Terrain_ in all adjacent _Arenas_.
special: Roaring is instead a _Greater Source_ if applied to an entire _Arena_. If a _Flammable_ piece of a _Terrain_ is _Destroyed_ any _Terrain_ created as a part of that is also _Roaring_.
interactions: If this would become _Wet_, it becomes _Blazing_ and _Wet_ is not applied.

name: Smoldering
desc: A burning piece of terrain that has been ignited.
effect: When creatures start their _Turn_ in this _Terrain_ or first enter it on their _Turn_ they take 2 _Fire_ Damage.
interactions: If this would become _Wet_, Smoldering is removed and _Wet_ is not applied. The _Terrain_ becomes _Veiled_.
